title: Another Excellent Day
overview: In the enchanting streets of Barcelona, a despondent movie director crosses paths with a gritty low-life gangster. Their fateful encounter sparks the birth of extraordinary alter egos, drawn straight from the depths of their dreams. Together, they embark on a mesmerizing journey that will push the boundaries of their lives to a point of no return.
